text:
- `[daemon] pty_spawn:` pre-provisioning → routed through tracing as `info` (visible, formatted) [...]    - **`src/daemon/server/pty_rpc.rs`**
     - `could not resolve identity` → `tracing::warn!(slug, error, "pty_spawn: could not resolve identity")`
     - Already live concurrent instance → `tracing::info!(slug, scope, pubkey, "pty_spawn: launching concurrent instance")`
     - Pre-provisioning channel → `tracing::info!(slug, scope, pubkey, "pty_spawn: pre-provisioning channel")`
     - Channel provisioning timeout → `tracing::warn!(scope, "pty_spawn: channel provisioning timed out; proceeding")`
